kw.name: I am authenticated as admin
The current user should be admin
I try to log in as admin with password wrongpassword

kw.name: The response status should be 401
I try to log in as ghost with password ghost123

kw.name: The response status should be 401

test.name: Valid credentials give access to protected resource

kw.name: I am authenticated as admin

I am authenticated as admin
I create a project named Acme App
The project name should be Acme App

I create a project named Old Name
I rename the project to New Name

I clean up the current project

I create a project named To Be Deleted
I delete the project
the project should no longer exist
I clean up the current project

test.name: Create a test case inside a suite

kw.name: I am authenticated as admin
I create a project named Case Project
I create a suite named Login Suite
I create a test case named Happy Path Login

kw.name: The suite should have 1 test cases
kw.source_name: the suite should have ${count} test cases

kw.name: The test case name should be Happy Path Login
kw.source_name: the test case name should be ${name}

kw.name: I clean up the current project

I create a suite named Suite A

I create a project named Delete Case Project
I create a suite named Suite B
I create a test case named Disposable Case

the test case should no longer exist
I clean up the current project
I am authenticated as admin
I create a project named Steps Project
I create a suite named Steps Suite
I create a test case named Multi-Step Case

kw.name: I add a step Open the login page to the test case
kw.source_name: I add a step ${action} to the test case
kw.msg: Added action step 'Open the login page' → id=1881

kw.name: I add a step Enter valid credentials to the test case
kw.source_name: I add a step ${action} to the test case
kw.msg: Added action step 'Enter valid credentials' → id=1882

kw.msg: Added action step 'Submit the form' → id=1883

kw.name: The test case should have 3 steps
kw.source_name: the test case should have ${count} steps

test.name: Test case with setup and teardown steps

kw.name: I am authenticated as admin
I create a project named Lifecycle Project
I create a suite named Lifecycle Suite
I create a test case named Lifecycle Case

kw.msg: Added action step 'Execute the main flow' → id=1894

kw.msg: Added teardown step 'Clean up test data' → id=1895

kw.name: The test case should have 3 steps
kw.source_name: the test case should have ${count} steps

kw.name: I clean up the current project

test.name: Test case with external ID for automation matching

kw.name: I am authenticated as admin
I create a project named Automation Project
I create a suite named Automation Suite
I create a test case named Automated Login with external id com.example.LoginTest.testHappyPath

kw.name: The test case name should be Automated Login

I create a project named Exec Project
I create a suite named Exec Suite
I create a test case named Login Test

I report case ${case_id} as passed
I complete the execution

I start an execution titled Run To Abort
I abort the execution

I complete the execution

kw.name: the execution version should be set

I create a project named Tagged App
I create version 1.0.0 tagged v1.0.0
The version status should be active
I clean up the current project

test.name: Import JUnit results and match by external ID

kw.name: I am authenticated as admin
I create a project named JUnit Import Project
I create a suite named Login Test Suite
I create a test case named Happy Path Login with external id com.example.LoginTest.testHappyPath

kw.name: I create a test case named Wrong Password with external id com.example.LoginTest.testWrongPassword
kw.source_name: I create a test case named ${name} with external id ${external_id}

kw.name: I start an execution titled JUnit Run for the current suite
kw.source_name: I start an execution titled ${title} for the current suite

kw.name: I import JUnit results from ${JUNIT_FILE} and store the summary
kw.source_name: I import JUnit results from ${file_path} and store the summary

kw.name: The import should have updated 2 results
kw.source_name: the import should have updated ${count} results

kw.name: I clean up the current project

I create a user token named Listed Token

kw.name: I list my user tokens
Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.name: Create a sub-suite inside a parent suite

kw.name: the child suites list should contain the sub-suite
I clean up the current project

test.name: Root suite list does not include child suites

I create a sub-suite named Nested Suite inside the current suite

test.name: Multiple child suites under one parent
